import React, { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'; import './App.css'; const projects = [ { num: '01', name: 'Bajoma', desc: 'Agricultural marketplace connecting farmers directly to buyers across African markets. Designed for low bandwidth, high trust.', tags: ['Mobile', 'UX', 'UI', 'Africa'], bg: 'B', color: '#EEF2FF', }, { num: '02', name: 'Projina', desc: 'Company management system for employees and internal operations. Built for clarity and team efficiency.', tags: ['Web', 'UX', 'UI', 'SaaS'], bg: 'P', color: '#F0FDF4', }, { num: '03', name: 'Crestlancing', desc: 'Modern company website redesign focused on clarity and conversion. From wireframe to polished final design.', tags: ['Web', 'UI', 'Branding'], bg: 'C', color: '#FFF7ED', }, { num: '04', name: "L'Afrik", desc: 'Luxury ecommerce platform for African women\'s fashion. Designed to feel calm, premium and unapologetically African.', tags: ['Web', 'UI', 'Ecommerce'], bg: 'L', color: '#FDF4FF', }, ]; const marqueeItems = [ { text: 'Product Design', accent: false }, { text: '✦', accent: true }, { text: 'UX Research', accent: false }, { text: '✦', accent: true }, { text: 'African Context', accent: false }, { text: '✦', accent: true }, { text: 'Systems Thinking', accent: false }, { text: '✦', accent: true }, { text: 'UI Design', accent: false }, { text: '✦', accent: true }, { text: 'Prototyping', accent: false }, { text: '✦', accent: true }, { text: 'Wireframing', accent: false }, { text: '✦', accent: true }, { text: 'Product Design', accent: false }, { text: '✦', accent: true }, { text: 'UX Research', accent: false }, { text: '✦', accent: true }, { text: 'African Context', accent: false }, { text: '✦', accent: true }, { text: 'Systems Thinking', accent: false }, { text: '✦', accent: true }, { text: 'UI Design', accent: false }, { text: '✦', accent: true }, { text: 'Prototyping', accent: false }, { text: '✦', accent: true }, { text: 'Wireframing', accent: false }, { text: '✦', accent: true }, ]; export default function App() { const cursorRef = useRef(null); const [hovering, setHovering] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { const move = (e: MouseEvent) => { if (cursorRef.current) { cursorRef.current.style.left = e.clientX + 'px'; cursorRef.current.style.top = e.clientY + 'px'; } }; window.addEventListener('mousemove', move); const hoverEls = document.querySelectorAll('a, button, .project-card'); hoverEls.forEach(el => { el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => setHovering(true)); el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => setHovering(false)); }); return () => window.removeEventListener('mousemove', move); }, []); return ( <>

{/* ABOUT */}
About Me

A designer raised by
constraints most
products ignore.

I design digital products that solve real problems for African users. My background in graphic design gives me a strong visual foundation — pattern recognition, color instinct, knowing when something is off before I can explain why.

I think in systems and screens, designing experiences that are intuitive, accessible and built for the reality of African users.

{['UX Design', 'UI Design', 'Product Thinking', 'Research', 'Prototyping', 'Figma', 'Wireframing', 'Visual Storytelling'].map((s, i) => ( {s} ))}
{[ { num: '01', title: 'Trust over beauty', desc: 'Users must feel safe before they act. Every design decision should build confidence first.' }, { num: '02', title: 'Bandwidth as a constraint', desc: 'Designing for variable connectivity isn\'t a limitation — it\'s a discipline that makes everything better.' }, { num: '03', title: 'Design for the reality', desc: 'Not the ideal. The best product for African users is built from the ground up for the context it lives in.' }, { num: '04', title: 'Systems before screens', desc: 'Understand how the whole thing works before drawing a single frame. Structure first. Aesthetics follow.' }, ].map((p, i) => (
